context: Evaluates whether the solution correctly implements an event handler module using the discraft pattern. Checks that the exported object has the required shape, that the event property references the correct Discord.js Events constant, and that the handler correctly accesses the guild's system channel to send a welcome message.

checklist.name: Default export shape
checklist.description: The module exports a default object containing both an `event` property and a `handler` async function, matching the discraft event module pattern.

checklist.name: Correct event constant
checklist.description: The `event` property is set to `Events.GuildMemberAdd` (or the equivalent string `'guildMemberAdd'`) from discord.js.

checklist.name: Handler signature
checklist.description: The `handler` is an async function accepting `(client, member)` where `client` is the Discord Client and `member` is a GuildMember.

checklist.name: System channel access
checklist.description: The handler accesses the guild's `systemChannel` property to determine where to send the welcome message.

checklist.name: Conditional message send
checklist.description: A welcome message containing the member's display name is sent to the system channel only when it exists; no action is taken when systemChannel is null.
